known_incompatibilities.issue: CVXR versions that renamed the exported solve() generic to psolve() (seen starting around CVXR 1.8.x) break ANCOMBC::ancombc2(), which still calls CVXR::solve() internally.
known_incompatibilities.fix: install.packages('CVXR', repos='https://packagemanager.posit.co/cran/2024-07-01') to get a pre-rename binary (CVXR 1.0-14 as of this snapshot).
